data.title: Wan Ren Zhi Shang
data.synopsis:
Yi Feng transmigrates to the Immortal River Continent. Born without spiritual roots, he can only barely survive using the "essential life skills" bestowed upon him by the system. Unbeknownst to him, in the eyes of other cultivators, his strength is already god-like, and his every move affects the entire Immortal River Continent. Unaware of his surroundings, Yi Feng skillfully resolves numerous crises, bringing many exciting and hilarious scenes, and offering new opportunities and choices to the people living on this continent.

(Source: iQIYI YouTube Channel)
data.background: Animated adaptation of the vertical scroll manhua of the same name by Boyi Comics (博易动漫), which was adapted from the web novel Xuanhuan: Yuanlai Wo Shi Jueshi Wushen (玄幻：原来我是绝世武神).

data.title: Tianzi Chuanqi: Ji Fa Pian
data.synopsis:
Gifted with supernatural powers, Ji Fa was feared by King Zhou. In order to protect his relatives and friends, Ji Fa went berserk several times—his power got out of control and his life was in danger. The death of his master, the loss of his friends, the death of his mother, and the great mission bestowed upon the young hero, tempering him on the path to martyrdom.

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Chang An Du Wu Si
data.synopsis:
Martial artists with strange bones and unique skills are called Qiwu people. Some Qiwu people who pursued prosperity and peace surrendered to the imperial court and formed the "Duwu Division," while other Qiwu people who pursued hegemony in troubled times formed the "Zhenwu Society." 

In the early years of the Tang Dynasty, the Zhenwu Society was in chaos. Yun Xinxiao, a good-for-nothing brother who was invited to the capital of gods, joined the Chang An Duwu Division in the crisis, underwent a strange bone transplant and received unique skills. Yun Xinxiao and his fellow Duwusi companions, including Shi Nan and Themis, go from the streets to the imperial palace and into every corner of Chang An City, gradually uncovering the mysterious cause of death of their brother Yun Xinyao, and finding out the mastermind behind the death, Bu Wenjun, in a bid to crack down on a super terrorist attack against the current Supreme and even the entire prosperous age. The road of revenge and protection is full of unknowns. Yun Xinxiao's choice will determine the fate of Chang An...

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Shi Shen
data.background: Based on Stephen Chow's live-action movie of the same name.

data.title: Zi Heian Zhong Zou Lai
data.synopsis:
Li Hai, a soldier leader who is tired of killing, transforms himself into a valley detective and hides in the city. He wants to live an ordinary life, but unexpectedly opens up a new world of extraordinary people. The darkness follows him like a shadow and there is no escape from it, so he goes back and defeats him!

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Tsuki no Utsuwa
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Tsuki no Utsuwa by Skirt.

data.title: Caishen Dou Zhanlong
data.synopsis:
Taoist Cui accidentally released the treasure-gathering golden toad in order to read the heavenly book. The golden toad coveted the prosperity of the human world and reincarnated as a human, Dou Zhanlong. In order to avoid the heavenly calamity, the golden toad tore the three souls and seven spirits in Dou Zhanlong's spiritual cavity, creating nine clones, which fell into nine places respectively. The nine Dou Zhanlongs were in different parallel time and space, and each death gave rise to a new clone. They experienced "nine deaths and thirteen disasters" in total. Our story starts with the first Dou Zhanlong.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Tianxia Ba Chang's (天下霸唱) novel, Dou Zhanlong Bie Bao: Qi Gan Ba Jingang (窦占龙憋宝：七杆八金刚).

data.title: Yongbing Tianxia
data.synopsis:
Three unknown mercenaries, with their unyielding spirit, wrote an unparalleled legend that will last through the ages.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Shuobude Dashi's (说不得大师) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Jian Ke
data.synopsis:
In the Sanlin Star Region of the Federation, Xu Le, an orphan from the Donglin area, works as a clerk in the shop of the mechanic Feng Yu. Feng Yu teaches Xu Le mechanic techniques and ancient martial arts moves. But one day, Feng Yu is hunted down by the Federation military, and Xu Le is inexplicably implicated and becomes a wanted criminal of the Federation. 

After witnessing Feng Yu's "death," Xu Le uses the chip left by Feng Yu to replace his own chip (which also confuses him as to who he is?) and changes his identity to study at Xinglihua University in the capital, where he meets Jian Shuier who's superstar of the Federation, Tai Zhiyuan who's a former royal family member of the Federation, Shi Qinghai who's a spy from Qinglong Mountain, and Zhang Xiaomeng who's a spy from Qinglong Mountain. He also drives a mecha for the first time and fights...

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Mao Ni's (猫腻) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Qixing Lu Wanggong
data.synopsis:
Fifty years ago, Wu Laogou, the ancestor of the Wu family, accidentally entered a mysterious place and encountered a bizarre disaster, which almost made him extinct. Fifty years later, Wu Xie, who inherited his ancestral antique shop, obtained a rubbing of a silk book by chance, from which he discovered the ancient text materials he had been studying for a long time. Wu Xie found his third uncle Wu Sanxing, and decided to go to the ruins with his third uncle and several helpers, Menyouping, Pan Zi, and Da Kui. 

The group who fell into the ruins broke through many obstacles in the Seven-Star Lu Palace, and at the same time, they also unraveled the life of King Lu Shang and his ultimate intentions. After escaping danger, Wu Xie decided not to get involved anymore, but he didn't know that he had already joined the game, and what was waiting for him would be a bigger conspiracy...

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Xiang Wang Shi
data.synopsis:
The whale swallowed the present world, and the human race was in trouble. The boy practiced the "forgetfulness technique" at the cost of his memory to prevent the catastrophe! Will they live together in the face of adversity, or will they forget each other in the arena?

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Yi Na He Qiaqia 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
Age-appropriate and personality-based parenting. Enjoy Chinese cuisine and traditional games with Ina and Chacha, allowing children to grow happily in familiar daily life, exploring the world while cultivating empathy and a sense of responsibility. With cheerful rhythmic music and immersive interactive visuals, let's move with Ina and Chacha!

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Shuangsheng Wu Hun
data.synopsis:
Lin Fan, who was born in a noble family in Dalin County, was originally a peerless genius who was awarded the Tianjiao Order, but his martial soul was taken away by his fiancée, and he became a waste. When a mysterious demon parasitized Lin Fan and reactivated his abandoned martial soul, making him a rare dual martial soul physique, Lin Fan officially embarked on the road to rise, from a small county town to the heavens and the worlds.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Xing Shi's (行十) web novel, Zhizun Wu Hun (至尊武魂).

data.title: Dang Shen Bu Rang
data.synopsis:
Yang Jian is the god in heaven who is in charge of eliminating disasters. He will violently and mercilessly destroy any target that brings harm to the three realms. However, the crisis of spiritual energy depletion in the world is imminent, and Yang Jian falls into the human world. Only by learning to influence the monsters in the world with true emotions instead of violence can he complete his mission and return to heaven as a god. Yang Jian, who has no other talent except violence, finds his his former partner Xiaotian Quan (a black dog), reincarnated as a mortal girl by the name of Wang Xiaoxiao, and begins a monster-hunting operation of unprecedented difficulty.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Saibo Jian Xian Tie Yu
data.synopsis:
Fang Bailu, a modern terminally ill patient, wakes up after being frozen for a thousand years in a world where prosperous cyber and ancient cultivation are blended. He embarks on a journey to fight against destiny and face the disaster of the resurrection of a mysterious immortal.

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Watashi ga Yume kara Sametara
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Watashi ga Yume kara Sametara by Skirt.

data.title: Switch (Music)
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Switch by Skirt.

data.title: Uruwashi no Yoi no Tsuki
data.synopsis:
Every time Yoi Takiguchi so much as lets out a sigh, her female classmates squeal in admiration and awe. She has been dubbed the school's "prince" by virtue of her boyishly attractive appearance and casual disposition. However, she chooses to be indifferent toward the attention she receives and spends her days normally—that is, until the school's other prince, Kohaku Ichimura, waltzes into her life and calls her beautiful.

Kohaku is nothing like a prince—he acts thoughtlessly and does as he pleases. But when he compliments her, Yoi feels flustered, and the way he looks at her gets her all nervous. He is the first boy to acknowledge her as a girl, and her attempts to distance herself prove futile as he seems to have set his sights on her. While Yoi keeps telling herself that it is nothing serious, even she cannot completely ignore the stir Kohaku causes in her heart.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Shichifukujin
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Shichifukujin by Wednesday Campanella.

data.title: Kaseijin
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Kaseijin by Yorushika. The song was used as the opening theme of the anime Shoushimin Series 2nd Season.

data.title: Charisma Jamboree
data.title_japanese: カリスマジャンボリー
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Charisma Jamboree by Charisma.

data.title: Shinsei Galverse
data.synopsis:
Long ago, harmony across the galaxy was maintained by a sacred star known as the Mother Planet. But that peace was shattered when the Mother mysteriously exploded and vanished without a trace.

In the aftermath, the galaxy plunged into chaos and conflict. Yet from the scattered remnants of the Mother Planet, new beings were born—sentient fragments known as the Galverse.

Now, these Galverse girls, each imbued with extraordinary powers and an unstoppable gal spirit, rise to confront the evil organization "Space End Society." As they battle across the stars, they begin to uncover the truth behind the galaxy's collapse—and the fate of the Mother Planet itself.

(Source: MAL News)
